secondary_archetype: Insurance Product Manager (P&C / personal lines focused)

level_signals: Minimum 5+ years personal lines insurance experience
Comp range $110K-$135K base consistent with senior IC in insurance domain

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of P&C experience, with a minimum of 5+ years of personal lines insurance experience in either product development, product management, or state management
with a minimum of 5+ years of personal lines insurance experience in either product development, product management, or state management
Bachelor's degree in Business, Insurance, Finance, Economics, Statistics, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
credentials_named: Bachelor's degree in Business, Insurance, Finance, Economics, Statistics

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong collaborative spirit and exceptional written and verbal communication skills, enabling effective teamwork across departments
A strategic thinker, willing to challenge the status quo and open-minded to creative solutions that redefine insurance
Exceptional analytical skills and attention to detail, with a knack for identifying trends and taking action to optimize product performance
Advanced Microsoft Office or Google Suite skills
Excellent organizational and project management capabilities, comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Ability to work in a remote environment
Enthusiasm about learning and adapting to the exciting world of AI – a commitment to exploring this field is a fundamental part of our culture

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong technical skills (SQL, Python, Looker, or similar systems), including experience building dashboards or reports, preferred

explicitly_excluded: Applicants from Colorado, California, Montana, Hawaii, New Mexico and Puerto Rico

scope.surface: Car insurance product (personal lines, countrywide expansion)
core_responsibilities: Develop new innovative car products to meet the needs of new emerging customer segments, including connected, autonomously driven cars
Measure the impact of product changes to support future learnings and data-driven decision-making
Build comprehensive product specification documents, identify project requirements, and partner with the Product team to prioritize and implement new features
Research distribution channels, market trends, and competitor actions
Advance our countrywide product and car strategy through forms, coverages, policy language, and rating plan sophistication
Partner with actuarial and underwriting experts to work on the development of coverage, pricing adequacy and accuracy, and eligibility requirements
Collaborate with the Insurance Operations team to facilitate regulatory approval for product changes

green_flags: Fully remote role with LI-Remote tag
Clear product domain and ownership (Car insurance countrywide strategy)
AI-first culture explicitly described with genuine context, not just a tagline claim
Encourages creativity and challenging the status quo
red_flags: No visa sponsorship — explicitly stated, eliminating non-authorized workers
Six states/territories excluded (Colorado, California, Montana, Hawaii, New Mexico, Puerto Rico) — unusual geographic restrictions for a remote role
7+ years P&C with 5+ personal lines is a very specific and high bar that may be difficult to bridge
SQL/Python/Looker listed as 'preferred' but phrased strongly as 'Strong technical skills ... preferred' — unclear how hard this requirement actually is in practice
